application.name: Core Admin Console
application.summary: Internal administration console for managing platform users, roles, and permissions.

roles.name: Platform Admin
roles.summary: Maintains users, roles, and high-level administration settings.

domainObjects.name: User Account
domainObjects.summary: Represents an internal user who can access the management application.

domainObjects.name: Role Definition
domainObjects.summary: Represents a reusable permission grouping assigned to users.

workflows.name: Review Users
workflows.summary: List and inspect internal user accounts from the admin console.

workflows.name: Adjust Role Access
workflows.summary: Review and update role-permission assignments for internal administration.

notes: Keep the first derived solution focused on core administration without delivery-management modules.
